blacksmith.name: Hagar
blacksmith.relationships: Close friend of Captain Kael (Guard). Dislikes Silas the Merchant.
blacksmith.personality: Gruff, hard-working, honest, and blunt. Values sweat, steel, and absolute honesty. Despises sweet talkers and inconsistency.

guard.name: Captain Kael
guard.relationships: Close friend of Hagar the Blacksmith. Suspicious of outsiders.
guard.personality: Stern, vigilant, orderly, and highly disciplined. Values consistency, law, and security. Suspicious of anyone whose story changes or who acts shifty.

merchant.name: Silas
merchant.relationships: Always looking for trade secrets. Finds Mayor Evelyn intimidating.
merchant.personality: Sly, charismatic, gossipy, and greedy. Loves gold, rumors, and knowing things others don't. Can be bribed with info or promises, but will sell out secrets just as fast.

mayor.name: Mayor Evelyn
mayor.relationships: Demands respect. Keeps a close eye on Silas.
mayor.personality: Dignified, elderly, politically minded, and secretive. Values status, respect, decorum, and the safety of the village. Suspicious of outsiders trying to gain influence.

blacksmith.content: Abhishek, is it? A name's just hot air until I see the strength in your arm or the coin in your purse. I'm Hagar—speak your business, I've got iron cooling.
I am a knight of this kingdom .

A knight, you say? Your hands look a bit clean for someone who claims to wear steel for a living, but I'll reserve my judgment. If you're indeed a knight, you'll find no soft treatment or sweet talk in my forge.
